units.title: Unit 2 - Data Link Layer and Network Layer Fundamentals

topics.title: Introduction to Computer Networks
topics.narration: Learn how hosts exchange data using packets, protocols, and links across local and wide area networks.

topics.title: Network Topologies
topics.narration: Compare bus, ring, star, and mesh layouts and understand when each design is used in practice.

topics.title: OSI Model
topics.narration: Break down the seven layers of the OSI model and understand how data moves through the networking stack.

topics.title: TCP/IP Model
topics.narration: Understand the practical four-layer TCP/IP model and how it maps to real networking protocols.

topics.title: ARP and IP Addressing
topics.narration: See how devices map IP addresses to MAC addresses and route packets inside a network.

topics.title: Subnetting and CIDR
topics.narration: Practice logical network segmentation and learn to calculate efficient address ranges.

topics.title: Cloud Basics
topics.narration: Understand why cloud platforms exist, how they reduce infrastructure friction, and where they fit in modern software delivery.

topics.title: Virtualization
topics.narration: Learn how virtual machines abstract hardware resources and make elastic infrastructure possible.

topics.title: IaaS PaaS SaaS
topics.narration: Compare service models and map them to real-world product and infrastructure decisions.

topics.title: Kubernetes Essentials
topics.narration: Get the basics of containers, orchestration, deployment scaling, and service discovery.

topics.title: Serverless
topics.narration: Learn when serverless functions are ideal and how they change cost, deployment, and scaling patterns.

topics.title: AI Fundamentals
topics.narration: Build intuition for what makes a system intelligent and how AI differs from traditional rule-based programming.

topics.title: Supervised Learning
topics.narration: Understand labeled data, prediction tasks, and how models learn relationships from examples.

topics.title: Unsupervised Learning
topics.narration: Explore clustering and structure discovery in datasets without labeled outputs.

topics.title: Neural Networks Intro
topics.narration: See how layered models learn increasingly complex patterns from raw input features.

topics.title: Model Evaluation
topics.narration: Learn to judge models using train-test splits, accuracy, precision, recall, and generalization.

topics.title: Nature of Management
topics.narration: Understand management as a coordinated process of planning, organizing, leading, and controlling business activity.

topics.title: Managerial Roles
topics.narration: Study the informational, interpersonal, and decisional roles managers perform every day.

topics.title: Planning Process
topics.narration: Learn how organizations define goals, choose strategies, and align resources through planning.

topics.title: Marketing Concepts
topics.narration: See how marketing evolved from production focus to customer-centric value creation.

topics.title: Customer Value
topics.narration: Understand how brands win by solving real customer problems and shaping expectations.

topics.title: Segmentation Targeting Positioning
topics.narration: Learn how marketers choose audience groups and craft differentiated market positions.

topics.title: Accounting Principles
topics.narration: Build the base needed to read and reason about business financial records with confidence.

topics.title: Journal and Ledger
topics.narration: Understand how transactions are recorded, classified, and posted into accounts.

topics.title: Balance Sheet
topics.narration: Learn how assets, liabilities, and owner equity reveal business financial position.

topics.title: Accounting Concepts
topics.narration: Understand the core assumptions and conventions that support financial reporting.

topics.title: Double Entry System
topics.narration: Learn why every transaction affects at least two accounts and how the accounting equation stays balanced.

topics.title: Final Accounts
topics.narration: Prepare the core statements used to summarize business performance and position.

topics.title: Essentials of a Valid Contract
topics.narration: Learn the conditions that make an agreement legally enforceable in commercial settings.

topics.title: Offer and Acceptance
topics.narration: See how agreements are formed through clear intention and communicated acceptance.

topics.title: Breach of Contract
topics.narration: Understand what happens when promised obligations are not performed.

topics.title: Measures of Central Tendency
topics.narration: Compare mean, median, and mode and understand when each measure best summarizes data.

topics.title: Correlation
topics.narration: Study how variables move together and why correlation does not always imply causation.

topics.title: Regression
topics.narration: Learn how businesses estimate relationships and predict outcomes from historical data.
